subject: Update .env.example with CLIENT_PORTAL_URL
description:
Add `CLIENT_PORTAL_URL=https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com` to `.env.example` with a comment section.

Add under a new section after the "Base URL for link generation" section (around line 65-67):
```
# ============================================
# Client Portal (External Next.js App)
# ============================================
# External portal URL for client-facing proposal links
# The client portal is a separate Next.js app at portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com
CLIENT_PORTAL_URL=https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com
```
